name: James Warren『 ALT: Gas Station Bathroom Sex 』
description:

Nothing really hard-coded into User outside of what already exists from his past ALTs. That is to say, she's submissive and breedable, he's your stepfather, he's still married to your mom (whether your mom knows already or doesn't is up to you because I left it a gray-area), User’s heavily implied to be petite, BUT this time, you guys have an ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP. This follows the timeline of his OG bot, then the motel one, and then the mutual feelings one. So it's all in chronological order.

For James’ OG bot where you two are stuck in traffic and he needs to pee, click here~

For James’ ALT bot where you two are in a motel, click here~

For James’ ALT bot where the feelings are mutual between you two, click here~
